# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Proposal, §Artifact Metadata, §Input: JSON Format
# Covers: primary component metadata, single .components.json, CycloneDX 1.6 output,
# component fields round-trip (name, version, type, description, license, purl,
# supplier, external_references, scope, hashes).

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx --spec-version 1.6 -o out.cdx.json
exists out.cdx.json

# --- Primary component (from meta.yaml) ---
exec jq -e '.bomFormat == "CycloneDX"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.specVersion == "1.6"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.component.name == "device-firmware"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.component.version == "2.1.0"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.component.type == "firmware"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.component.supplier.name == "Acme Corp"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.component.licenses[0].license.id == "Apache-2.0"' out.cdx.json

# Spec §Output: sbomasm registered as a tool
exec jq -e '.metadata.tools.components[] | select(.name == "sbomasm")' out.cdx.json

# Spec §Artifact Metadata: lifecycles default = [{phase: "build"}]
exec jq -e '.metadata.lifecycles[0].phase == "build"' out.cdx.json

# --- Component ---
exec jq -e '.components | length == 1' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].name == "libmqtt"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].version == "4.3.0"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].type == "library"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].description == "MQTT client"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].purl == "pkg:generic/acme/libmqtt@4.3.0"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].supplier.name == "Acme Corp"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].licenses[0].license.id == "EPL-2.0"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].scope == "required"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].hashes[0].alg == "SHA-256"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '.components[0].hashes[0].content == "9f86d081884c7d659a2feaa0c55ad015a3bf4f1b2b0b822cd15d6c15b0f00a08"' out.cdx.json
exec jq -e '[.components[0].externalReferences[].type] | contains(["website","vcs","distribution"])' out.cdx.json

# --- Dependency graph ---
# Primary -> libmqtt (top-level attach since libmqtt has no depends-on)
exec jq -e '.dependencies | length >= 1' out.cdx.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: device-firmware
  version: 2.1.0
  primary_purpose: firmware
  description: Acme IoT firmware
  supplier:
    name: Acme Corp
    email: security@acme.example
  license:
    id: Apache-2.0
  copyright: (c) 2026 Acme Corp
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    {
      "name": "libmqtt",
      "version": "4.3.0",
      "type": "library",
      "description": "MQTT client",
      "supplier": { "name": "Acme Corp", "email": "support@acme.example" },
      "license": "EPL-2.0",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/acme/libmqtt@4.3.0",
      "external_references": [
        { "type": "website", "url": "https://acme.example/libmqtt" },
        { "type": "vcs", "url": "https://github.com/acme/libmqtt" },
        { "type": "distribution", "url": "https://acme.example/dl/libmqtt-4.3.0.tar.gz" }
      ],
      "hashes": [
        { "algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "9f86d081884c7d659a2feaa0c55ad015a3bf4f1b2b0b822cd15d6c15b0f00a08" }
      ],
      "scope": "required"
    }
  ]
}
